query:
ALTER TABLE payroll_batches 
ADD COLUMN is_unlocked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE AFTER updated_at,
ADD COLUMN unlock_reason TEXT AFTER is_unlocked,
ADD COLUMN unlocked_by INT AFTER unlock_reason,
ADD COLUMN unlocked_at TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER unlocked_by;
